narrative:
Fairview Park City has 12,329 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.7%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 13.8 percentage points.
